SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Biome
Represents a horizontal water depth zone (layer) with specific environmental parameters.
Consts
Configuration class that stores all global constants, configuration balance parameters, and base numbers for the simulation engine.
Egg
Represents a fish egg that can be fertilized by males and eventually hatches into a new fish.
Entity
Represents the base class for all moving and non-moving objects in the simulation world.
EntityTypes
Defines the core type groups for entities in the simulation world.
Fish
Represents the main living actor of the simulation.
FishStateTypes
Lists all possible AI behavior states available for the fish state machine.
FOVInfo
Field of Vision Info Helper class that stores structured information about everything a fish can see.
Genes
A data record that stores the genetic traits of a fish.
IProfilable
Interface implemented by objects that can generate a text description list of their internal states.
Meat
Represents a piece of meat left behind by a dead fish, which slowly sinks to the bottom.
Plant
Represents a static plant (algae) that spawns in water biomes and serves as food for herbivores.
Processing
Main graphical engine of the application based on the Processing library.
RND
Static utility class providing convenient helper methods for random number generation.
Sex
Defines the biological gender of a fish entity.
SimDataMonitor
Collects population statistics and genetic averages during the simulation.
SimManager
Main manager class that controls the core simulation loop.
State<T,E>
Abstract template class for implementing state behaviors in the Finite State Machine (FSM).
